ground_truth.title: The 2024 SELF Healthy Beauty Awards: The Best Oral Care Products for a Healthier Smile
ground_truth.author: Sara Coughlin
ground_truth.main_content:
Maybe you had to brush your teeth before you could watch TV growing up, or perhaps your dentist routinely shakes their head over your flossing habits. Whatever the reason, taking care of your oral hygiene can often feel like a chore. But even though it’s not exactly fun to get gunk out of your mouth, it’s one of those things that always makes you feel better after you’ve done it. And we think that with the right tools—like these 2024 Healthy Beauty Award winners for oral care—showing your teeth and gums some love can actually feel like a treat.

Our testers brushed, rinsed, flossed, and whitened with some of the latest, most exciting products out there. In the end, only a handful came out on top, including a smart electric toothbrush, a sleek retainer cleaner, and a seriously zesty mouthwash. Below, you’ll find all of this year’s winners—get ready to say Ahh.

Be sure to check out the rest of SELF’s 2024 Healthy Beauty Award winners here.

Best Electric Toothbrush: Burst Oral Care Pro Sonic Toothbrush

Why we love it: With enough smart features to feel like a true upgrade, but not too many that it’s overcomplicated or tedious to use, Burst’s Pro Sonic toothbrush hits a real sweet spot for anyone who wants to be a little more informed about their brushing. Its pressure sensor pauses the moment it feels you pressing too hard and won’t resume until you ease up. Its battery life is also impressive—our tester didn’t have to recharge it at all during the testing period.

Bonus points, per the experts: Given their rapid, consistent brushing motion, electric toothbrushes can provide a more thorough cleaning than manual options.

One tester said: “The pressure sensor has been extremely helpful. It’s training me to be gentler and better, generally, with my brushing the more I use it. Most importantly, though, the brush itself feels really, really good on my teeth. There’s a nub in the middle of the bristles that provides a nice massaging effect, and the bristles thoroughly clean my teeth (they feel supersmooth, even glossy, after every brush).”

Best Travel Toothbrush: Aquasonic Icon

Why we love it: The colorful Icon has its own carrying case, so it’s easy to bring along on your travels. And, given its price point, it’s also a great option for anyone who wants to try an electric toothbrush without making a major investment. One thing to note: According to the brand, you should use the same brushing technique that you would with a manual toothbrush to get the best results.

One tester said: “I absolutely loved that it didn’t take too much space in my overnight bag and stayed very neat and tidy among my other products. Over time, I noticed how clean my teeth felt after brushing, which made me second-guess how well I was brushing previously! Overall, I’m a big fan and may be converted to an automatic brush.”

Best Retainer Cleaner: Fresh Knight Sonic Fresh Ultrasonic Cleaner

Why we love it: If hand-brushing or using cleaning tablets on your retainer doesn’t seem to do the trick, give the Sonic Fresh Ultrasonic retainer cleaner from Fresh Knight a try. This compact device just needs water to disinfect and deodorize retainers of most sizes, and it only takes five minutes to get the job done.

Bonus points, per the experts: It’s important to clean your retainers regularly to prevent bacteria growth (which can cause bad breath).

One tester said: “If you are still trying to make peace with your crusty, musty, decade-old retainer, you need this. It only took a few minutes to clean and came out looking super sparkly and fresh.”

Best Toothpaste: Hello Vitamin C Whitening Toothpaste

Why we love it: Hello’s Vitamin C Whitening toothpaste is formulated to both whiten teeth and keep them healthy. Its peppermint flavor is refreshing and invigorating, and, for especially sluggish morning brushers, the cheery orange tube doesn’t hurt, either.

Bonus points, per the experts: This toothpaste contains fluoride, which can help strengthen teeth, reduce sensitivity, and prevent cavities.

One tester said: “When I first tried this toothpaste, I was a little surprised to see it was orange! Fun. It doesn’t lather quite as much as other toothpastes, but it does just enough to feel like you’re getting clean. And it doesn’t leave a ton of frothy mess. In terms of the whitening element, it hasn’t made my teeth sensitive yet (big plus!).”

Best Floss: Davids Expanding Dental Floss

Why we love it: Davids’ Expanding Dental Floss is made with hydroxyapatite, a mineral that can help strengthen enamel and reduce sensitivity. The floss itself expands as you use it, which helps it pick up more plaque and debris than standard floss. It also comes in a refillable metal dispenser, which is a nice sustainable touch.

Bonus points, per the experts: Flossing is essential for removing plaque and food particles from between teeth, where your toothbrush can’t reach.

One tester said: “This floss is a game-changer. It’s so much more effective than any other floss I’ve used, and I love that it comes in a refillable container. My teeth feel incredibly clean after using it.”

Best Mouthwash: TheraBreath Healthy Gums Oral Rinse

Why we love it: TheraBreath’s Healthy Gums Oral Rinse is alcohol-free and contains fluoride to help strengthen teeth and prevent cavities. It also has a refreshing mint flavor that isn’t too overpowering. Our testers found it left their mouths feeling clean and fresh without any burning sensation.

Bonus points, per the experts: Mouthwash can help reduce plaque and gingivitis, and fluoride rinses can help prevent cavities.

One tester said: “I’ve never been a big mouthwash person because I hate the burning feeling, but this one is so gentle and effective. My mouth feels incredibly clean after using it, and I’ve noticed a difference in my gum health.”
with: Maybe you had to brush your teeth before you could watch TV growing up, or perhaps your dentist routinely shakes their head over your flossing habits.
Our testers brushed, rinsed, flossed, and whitened with some of the latest, most exciting products out there.
Best Electric Toothbrush: Burst Oral Care Pro Sonic Toothbrush - With enough smart features to feel like a true upgrade, but not too many that it’s overcomplicated or tedious to use.
Best Travel Toothbrush: Aquasonic Icon - The colorful Icon has its own carrying case, so it’s easy to bring along on your travels.
